AN EF1 TORNADO BRIEFLY TOUCHED DOWN IN KOSSUTH TWP BETWEEN BASKAHEGAN STREAM AND ROUTE 6 ON MONDAY EVENING. THERE WERE TWO CONCENTRATED AREAS OF TORNADO DAMAGE WITH SPORADIC DAMAGE IN BETWEEN ALONG IRON BRIDGE RD. APPROXIMATELY 120 SOFTWOOD TREES WERE EITHER UPROOTED OR SNAPPED.
MANY DOWNED TREES ACROSS ACADIA NATIONAL PARK AND MOUNT DESERT ISLAND WITH MULTIPLE ROAD CLOSURES.

WASHINGTON COUNTY REGIONAL COMMUNICATIONS CENTER REPORTS ROUTE 1 IN EDMUNDS IS TOTALLY BLOCKED BY LARGE TREE AND WIRES DOWN IN THE ROAD. ALSO VERY MANY REPORTS OF TREE AND WIRES DOWN ALL OVER THE COUNTY ESPECIALLY ALONG THE ROUTE 1 CORRIDOR, INCLUDING SIDE ROADS.
